summary:
Claim: Metal base dentures offer better tissue tolerance due to superior force distribution.  
Evidence: - Metal provides more even pressure distribution across the underlying tissues. - This reduces localized stress, improving patient comfort and long-term stability.  
Answer: A  

This summary retains all critical points from Agent2’s argument—focusing on biomechanics, tissue protection, and clinical outcomes—while eliminating redundancy and maintaining clarity. It directly supports the claim with precise evidence and selects option A as correct based on established dental principles regarding material performance in removable prosthodontics.
